text.title: Modern BA Framework: BABOK for Agile, AI/ML, Cloud, and Platform Delivery Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end walked example applying the modern-ba-framework methodology, producing a valid artefact per `02-output-contract.xml`.

section.title: End-to-end example
section.narrative: AI/ML platform modernisation → BAA-0011 declares [agile, ai_ml, platform] → KA-5 adds dataset + model eval gates → KA-3 adds platform contract versioning → templates emitted; ML lead owns model eval plan.

section.title: Resulting artefact
